landing.description: Rate artists, build your schedule together, and know where to be at every moment.
landing.feature1_desc: Interest, priority and curiosity — the group score decides what you can't miss.
landing.feature2_desc: Create a private group, share a link and see everyone's ratings in real time.
landing.feature3_desc: When schedules drop, see the day's timeline and conflicts between your MUST SEEs.
landing.feature4_desc: Mark which shows you want to see — your friends always know where to find you.

auth.have_account: Already have an account? Log in
auth.confirm_email: Check your email to confirm your account.

dashboard.title: Your groups
dashboard.empty_sub: Find a festival and create or join a group.

group.no_groups_sub: Create one or join with a code.

artists.no_artists_sub: Add the first artist with the + button
artists.interest_desc: How much you like the artist overall. This has the highest weight in the score.
artists.priority_desc: How important it is to see them live — rarity, rare tours, unique moments.
artists.curiosity_desc: How much you want to discover them — artists you don't know well but want to explore.
artists.seen_desc: If you've already seen them, it slightly reduces the never-seen bonus in the score.

conflicts.title: Schedule conflicts
conflicts.subtitle: MUST SEE and HIGH artists with overlapping times

onboarding.step1_desc: Browse festivals already on Stageside. The lineup is already loaded — nothing to do.
onboarding.step2_desc: Every festival has private groups. Create yours and invite friends with a simple link.
onboarding.step2_highlight: Only your group sees your ratings
onboarding.step3_desc: Rate artists together. The group score decides the MUST SEEs. Build your day plan and always know where to find each other.
onboarding.step3_highlight: Timeline, conflicts and plans in real time

not_found.festival_desc: This festival doesn't exist or is no longer available.
not_found.group_desc: This group doesn't exist or you don't have access.

forgot_password.title: Reset password
forgot_password.desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.sent_desc: Check your inbox and click the link to reset your password.

reset_password.title: New password
reset_password.too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
